ab: tupa’un cia tama nak ngan tu Biung.
tupa’un cia tina nak ngan tu Aping.
heza nak tatinin masitoqas, tupa’un tu Lukus, mac’an qan tas’a ka qamisan cia haip
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Lukus，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Lukus, he is 11 years old.

ab: maszang nam ma kaku’ dangian masipul.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.
Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: madu cak taldanav maca pal’u’un na, muskun cam tastulumaq taldanav.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，如果放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: asa cak pasaqal kaviaz, maqtu cam muskun tusauc taldanav.
ch: 我喜歡認識朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
